summary: Decomp-matching PR touching vi0501 and sysdolphin particle display code. The loaded report records particleSort reaching 100%, vi0501 .sdata reaching 100%, and progress in psDispParticles and un_8031D9F8, with one psdisp .sdata2 regression noted by the bot.

key_files.role: Implemented un_8031D9F8 and added related includes/static storage for VI character/demo setup.

diff_excerpt: vi0501.c replaces /// #un_8031D9F8 with a function body
bot_report: un_8031D9F8 improved 0.00% to 98.83%; vi0501 .sdata matched 100%

key_files.role: Refactored particleSort bucket chaining, added particle point/trail helper bodies, and changed psDispParticles control/data-flow.
evidence_refs: metadata.changed_files: src/sysdolphin/baselib/psdisp.c +641/-267
diff_excerpt: particleSort unrolled bucket handling replaced by two for loops

what_changed.text: Implemented vi0501 function un_8031D9F8 with stage/camera/item/player setup, Kirby spawn loop, JObj animation/translation sampling, and audio calls.

what_changed.text: Added vi0501 dependencies for camera, fighter demo, ground/stage/item/player/collision, GObj, and JObj APIs.

what_changed.text: Added static HSD_GObj* array un_804A2E98[4] in vi0501 and retained address-style names for unknown globals/statics.

what_changed.text: In particleSort, replaced a long unrolled bucket concatenation sequence with two indexed for loops over buckets 0-7 and 8-15.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: psdisp.c particleSort bucket loops
bot_report: particleSort reached 100%

what_changed.text: Added inline helper layers around getColorMatAmb and new inline particle drawing helpers for point and point-trail batching.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: psdisp.c getColorMatAmb_inner/getColorMatAmb_noinline additions
diff_excerpt: psdisp.c psDispSubPoint and psDispSubPointTrail additions

what_changed.text: Adjusted psDispParticles local lifetime/control-flow, including moving cache initialization earlier and replacing a switch-like channel-state block with nested conditionals in the shown excerpt.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: psDispParticles cache assignment moved before loop
diff_excerpt: psDispParticles chan_state handling changed from switch to nested ifs
bot_report: psDispParticles improved to 58.06%

smart_moves.text: The vi0501 implementation uses existing subsystem APIs and includes rather than source-local declarations in the shown slice.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When repeated generated-looking blocks only vary by bucket index, try a natural for-loop split over the relevant ranges; in this PR, two loops over buckets 0-7 and 8-15 supported a particleSort 100% report.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: particleSort replaces repeated bucket blocks with for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) and for (i = 8; i < 16; i++)
bot_report: particleSort 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Partial function progress may rely on local lifetime/control-flow reshaping before full match; keep such reshaping scoped to the target function and track report regressions separately.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: psDispParticles cache lifetime moved earlier and channel-state control flow reshaped
bot_report: psDispParticles improved 39.03% to 58.06%
bot_report: psdisp .sdata2 regressed -4 bytes

naming_conventions.text: Conservative address-style names were retained where semantics were not established in the slice, including un_8031D9F8 and un_804A2E98.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: vi0501.c function/static names

naming_conventions.text: Helper names in psdisp are operation-oriented when the behavior is evident from local code, e.g. psDispSubPoint and psDispSubPointTrail for point and trail batching helpers.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: psdisp.c adds psDispSubPoint and psDispSubPointTrail

accepted_candidate_records.title: Natural bucket loops can replace repeated generated bucket concatenation
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2539, particleSort replaced repeated generated-looking bucket concatenation blocks with two for loops over buckets 0-7 and 8-15, and the bot report recorded particleSort reaching 100%.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: particleSort for-loop replacement
